dosingInfo.rawDosageText: 2 DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION • For subcutaneous use only (2.1) • Acute treatment of migraine: single dose of 1 to 6 mg (2.1) • Acute treatment of cluster headache: single dose of 6 mg (2.1) • Maximum dose in a 24-hour period: 12 mg, separate doses by at least 1 hour (2.1) • Patients receiving doses other than 4 or 6 mg: Use the 6-mg single-dose vial (2.3) 2.1 Dosing Information The maximum single recommended adult dose of Sumatriptan injection, USP for the acute treatment of migraine or cluster h
